issues.detail: The skill only demonstrates happy path examples and does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill is limited to Python and Node.js environments, not fully cross-platform for all AI agents.

scenarios.name: semantic-search-with-rerank
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers almost all rubric requirements except the top‑5 retrieval step, while Response B uses a completely different API and misses all rubric criteria.

scenarios.name: rag-with-citations
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets most rubric items but lacks document IDs; Response A fails to use co.chat and the required document format.
